top3.sql:
WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    ss_customer_sk,
    d_year,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  GROUP BY ss_customer_sk, d_year
),
year_over_year AS (
  SELECT 
    curr.ss_customer_sk,
    curr.d_year AS curr_year,
    prev.d_year AS prev_year,
    curr.total_sales AS curr_sales,
    prev.total_sales AS prev_sales
  FROM yearly_sales curr
  JOIN yearly_sales prev 
    ON curr.ss_customer_sk = prev.ss_customer_sk 
  ...

WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    ss_customer_sk,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM d_date) AS d_year,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  GROUP BY ss_customer_sk, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM d_date)

WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    ss_customer_sk,
    d_year,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  GROUP BY ss_customer_sk, d_year
),
yearly_with_prev AS (
  SELECT 
    ss_customer_sk,
    d_year,
    total_sales,
    LAG(total_sales) OVER (PARTITION BY ss_customer_sk ORDER BY d_year) AS prev_sales
  FROM yearly_sales
)
